name: eidos-skills-hub
description: Discover, rank, cache, install, and update Codex skills across live, local, trusted, and Eidos sources.

interface.shortDescription: Find the right agent skill—and keep it trusted.
interface.longDescription: Search Skills.sh, Eidos catalogs, installed Codex skills, trusted libraries, and GitHub in parallel. Compare candidates with explainable source-aware ranking, inspect complete git-backed snapshots, and keep Codex skills current without surrendering control.
defaultPrompt: Find the best current skill for this task.
Search every configured skill library in parallel.
Audit my installed Codex skills for drift.
